segments.text: If working less and if procrastinating
instead of putting in your own effort is
feeling good in the short term but it's
only feeling good in the short term.
Ultimately value agency. You ultimately
value productivity ultimately value
effort. This entire experience has
taught you is that it's taught you your
value system. What is our value system?
When we stray away from our value
system, what happens is that's when we
start feeling regret. That's when we
start feeling guilt. When we act against
what we value, right? So this incident
is doing nothing but giving you
direction or giving you your value
system. So from the next time when you
are presented with opportunities for
cutting your work down, you know, it
looks tempting in the short term, but
it's not. It's going to take you down
that rabbit hole of regret and guilt
again and again, and that's going to
affect your work output. You'll erode
your ability to get things done in that
process.
